name: Trinity Place Holdings Inc.
summary: Trinity Place Holdings Inc. is a real estate holding, investment, development, and asset management company. Its assets include 77 Greenwich Street in Lower Manhattan (a 90-unit residential condominium tower with retail space and an elementary school), a 105-unit multi-family property at 237 11th Street in Brooklyn, and a retail property in Paramus, NJ. It also holds intellectual property including FilenesBasement.com, the Stanley Blacker brand, and the Running of the Brides trademark.
